Paper applies Transformer to machine translation tasks (WMT 2014 English-to-German: 28.4 BLEU, English-to-French: 41.8 BLEU). Verified via WebFetch and paper abstract.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real, well-known paper 'Attention Is All You Need' by Vaswani et al. (2017), published in Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 30. The paper introduces the Transformer architecture based on self-attention mechanisms and demonstrates its effectiveness on machine translation tasks (WMT 2014). The Zotero library is seeded with 18 real academic papers (10 classic computer science papers + 8 modern ML papers) using seed_library.py. All required keywords (Transformer, self-attention, translation) are verified as core concepts in the actual paper. The minimum note length of 100 characters is documented in both task.json and README.md.
